description: Develop and refine the core logic of Sonic. Focus on reasoning, facts, and ethical alignment.
Implement mechanistic interpretability and constitutional AI safeguards into our model pipeline.
Implement and optimize novel neural network architectures. Experience with Transformer models and LLMs is highly desired.
Develop high-scale backend services and developer tools that power the SpeedAI ecosystem.
Optimize and deploy large-scale models. Experience with PyTorch and distributed training is required.
Manage and maintain company-wide hardware, software, and networking architecture to ensure a seamless researcher experience.
Create stunning visual assets, illustrations, and brand identities for SpeedAI product launches.
Build high-performance interfaces for Sonic 1.0. Experience with React and real-time streaming required.
Scale our distributed training clusters. Expert knowledge of Kubernetes and NVIDIA CUDA is essential.
Craft the visual identity and user experience for the world's most capable AI companion.
